data.title: Trump: US had nothing to do with attack on Iran
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump posted on TruthSocial that "the United States had nothing to do with the attack on Iran tonight (Saturday local time). If we are attacked by Iran in any way, the U.S. armed forces will go all out on an unprecedented scale. However, we can easily reach an agreement between Iran and Israel to end this bloody conflict."

data.title: ZachXBT: The Hyperliquid ecosystem needs to complete compliance and analysis tools as soon as possible to avoid major incidents
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain analyst ZachXBT posted on a social platform that the Hyperliquid ecosystem urgently needs someone to invest in building a complete data analysis and compliance tool, otherwise related projects may face major event risks. He pointed out that it is currently very difficult to track the theft of personal assets on the Hyperliquid Core or EVM chain due to the lack of available tracking and auditing tools.

data.title: Gate will launch CRT Project (CRT) spot trading and HODLer Airdrop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate will launch CRT Project (CRT) spot trading at 14:00 (UTC+8) on June 16. The HODLer Airdrop event has been launched and will end at 10:00 (UTC+8) on June 16. Holders of 1 GT can receive the airdrop for free and share 2,000,000 CRT. The upper limit for individual participation is 1,000 GT.

data.title: Sahara AI has raised over $23.78 million, 2.8 times more than the original amount raised
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Buidlpad official news, the fourth phase of Sahara AI community distribution "Contribution Period" has now opened, and the deadline is June 15th 22:59 (UTC+8). Eligible users can use USD1 (ERC-20/BEP-20) or equivalent BNB to participate in the contribution, with a contribution amount range of 50 to 3,000 US dollars, and the excess will be refunded after settlement. Contribution does not equal the final distribution, and the qualifications still need to be verified. The refund and settlement will be completed at 23:00 on June 18, and the final result will be displayed on the Buidlpad page.
Chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa disclosed that the platform has currently eliminated about 69,000 suspicious accounts, and only about 34,000 accounts have passed the review to participate in this round of public offering. The fundraising target for this round is 8.5 million US dollars, and about 23.78 million US dollars have been raised so far, with an over-subscription ratio of 2.8 times.
